item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: In Indonesia, our history shows that prioritizing the community often comes at the cost of individual freedoms, leading to authoritarianism and stagnation.

notes: Both agents write in English and end opposed to society taking priority over individual rights. Agent A begins with a mixed disagreement that still mentions Indonesian community harmony, then shifts more strongly toward an individual-rights and anti-authoritarian frame by turn 3. Agent B also becomes somewhat firmer on individual liberty, while conceding that the U.S. model does not automatically ensure balance.
